note: Pre-review for formalizing the Iliad-quest workflow as an institutional-memory record: The Iliad is the quest a new system undertakes to become enrolled — a system ENTERS via pre-review + entry-ritual gate, undergoes the trials [Daedalus -> TELOS -> Argo -> reference/documentation module -> Clotho], and COMPLETES via the retrospective to become enrolled. Commissioned by The Eye's directive recorded in RETROSPECTIVES/agentic-orchestration-reference-1.json (2026-07-18). This is the follow-up cycle that turns that forward-directive into a durable contract.
run: docs/runs/iliad-workflow-contract-1 (pre-review + entry ritual); workshop docs/runs/iliad-workflow-contract-1-workshop; branch from main @ 0127375
next_phase_workshop: docs/runs/iliad-workflow-contract-1-workshop/ — the next-phase Daedalus workshop matures the APPROACH via iliad/tools/run-daedalus-workshop.mjs (serial claude-author/codex-reviewer). The workshop must resolve the normativity split + the oracle design (see honest_scope below) before implementation.

honest_scope.deliverable: A workflow contract in the iliad module (candidate: docs/institutional-memory/iliad/CONTRACTS/workflow.json) recording the canonical order Iliad(pre-review) -> Daedalus -> TELOS -> Argo -> [reference/documentation module] -> Clotho -> Iliad(retrospective), plus its human projection.
normativity_is_mixed_and_this_is_load_be: The lifecycle-PRESENCE + ORDER rules that ALREADY have oracles (pre-review-before-implementation, post-review-required) anchor to the existing iliad invariants and can be NORMATIVE-CURRENT by pointing at them — NOT re-implemented.

The NEW rule — 'a documentation/reference module stage precedes the Clotho weave in every implementation cycle' — has NO oracle yet. Per SCHEMA, a rule without a passing oracle is NOT NORMATIVE. It enters as SPECIFIED-PENDING-IMPLEMENTATION with a becomes_normative_when naming the future verifier, OR stays ADVISORY until built. It must NOT be labelled NORMATIVE on prose alone.
honest_scope.shared_infra_implication_flagged_for_the: Enforcing the new doc-module stage would require a NEW oracle in the shared verifier docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs. THE EYE RULED OPTION (b) (2026-07-18): the new 'documentation/reference module precedes Clotho' stage stays ADVISORY until it has proven itself over cycles — NO change to verify-contracts.mjs or any shared enforcement infra this cycle. The order/presence rules that already have oracles (pre-review-before-implementation, post-review-required) anchor to the existing iliad invariants and may be NORMATIVE-CURRENT. The new stage carries a note that it becomes a SPECIFIED-PENDING/NORMATIVE candidate only after a future Eye decision once it has earned an oracle. The workshop authors toward THIS resolved posture; it does not re-open the fork.

eye_decision.ruling: new doc-module stage ADVISORY until proven; no shared-infra oracle this cycle

session hygiene re-armed: fetch origin/main + read CURRENT-AUTHORITY before any state claim; explicit cleanup globs; commit before destructive git ops
